results.rendered_html:
abhukta a.
1 Uneaten, unenjoyed, unused;  Bh. 3. 25. 
2 (Actively used) One who has not eaten, enjoyed, used &c.; cf. pīta.
Comp.
— mūlaṃ the interval between the closing part of Jyeṣṭhā and the beginning of Mūla.
